name: agentic-workflow-kit
description: Generic, tracker-driven, spec-first delivery workflow for any repo: plan products and tracks, implement stories end-to-end, and optionally orchestrate autonomous multi-session runs.

interface.longDescription: Plan PRDs, decompose them into tracker stories, implement one story at a time, and optionally dry-run or launch orchestrated Codex child sessions from the same tracker/config contract.
defaultPrompt: Use agentic-workflow-kit to initialize tracker-driven delivery in this repo.
Use agentic-workflow-kit to create a PRD and delivery tracker for this product work.
Use agentic-workflow-kit to implement the next eligible tracker story.
